title: cnidoscolus subinteger
intro: Cnidoscolus subinteger, also known as the lesser barbless cactus apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and acting as an antiseptic. Cnidoscolus subinteger can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for various herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems can be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
